trade.summary: Trade has collapsed dramatically since 2022 due to Swiss adoption of EU sanctions. Svizzera exports pharmaceuticals and some exempt goods. Russia exports minimal goods. Pre-war trade was significantly larger. Commodity trading (energy, metals) through Geneva trading houses has sharply curtailed.
disputes: Swiss adoption of EU sanctions packages against Russia (2022-2025)

diplomatic.summary: Relations severely damaged since Russia's full-scale invasion of Ucraina in 2022. Svizzera abandoned its traditional neutrality to adopt EU sanctions, which Russia protested strongly. Svizzera still officially maintains diplomatic channels as a neutral state and hosts some Russia-related international talks. Russia revoked Svizzera's status as a potential peace mediator at various points.
recent_incidents: Svizzera adopted multiple EU sanctions packages against Russia (2022-2025)
Russia removed Svizzera from list of friendly nations

military.summary: No military cooperation. Svizzera refused to allow re-export of Swiss-made arms components to Ucraina (re-export ban), creating diplomatic friction with European allies. No joint exercises.
incidents: Swiss refusal to allow re-export of Swiss-made ammunition to Ukraine

financial.summary: Swiss banks froze approximately CHF 7.9 billion in Russian assets following sanctions. Swiss financial services access for Russian entities severely curtailed. Geneva commodity trading houses (Vitol, Trafigura, Glencore) significantly reduced Russia-linked trading. SWIFT exclusions affect bilateral transactions.

energy.summary: Svizzera has substantially reduced Russian energy imports following sanctions and European energy diversification. Pre-war, some Russian gas transited through Europe to Svizzera. Russian energy exports to Svizzera now minimal.

scientific.summary: Scientific cooperation largely suspended since 2022. Swiss universities and research institutions severed formal ties with Russian counterparts. Individual researcher connections remain but institutional cooperation is minimal.
